name: PhonePe SELECT BLACK Credit Card

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic lounge visits every year, capped at 1 visit per quarter.
international: Complimentary Priority Pass membership is provided for the first 2 card membership years; lounge visits beyond any complimentary allowance are charged at the programme's prevailing rate.

milestones.label: Yatra e-Voucher worth ₹5,000 on annual spends of ₹5 lakh

milestoneBenefits: Yatra e-Voucher worth ₹5,000 on annual spends of ₹5 lakh
joiningBenefits: PhonePe e-Gift Card worth ₹1,500 after payment of annual fee, unless the card is issued under a first-year-free offer

joiningBenefitsValued.label: PhonePe e-Gift Card worth ₹1,500 after payment of annual fee, unless the card is issued under a first-year-free offer

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends
Available on RuPay and Visa networks

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

additionalDetails: Accelerated RPs on PhonePe spends (10 RP / 100) is applicable only on select categories - Recharges, Utilities, Bill Payments, Insurance and Travel.
internalNotes: Audited against official PhonePe SBI Card SELECT BLACK product page, reward program T&C, welcome benefit T&C, milestone T&C, reward redemption FAQ, Priority Pass FAQ, and customer notices page on 2026-06-08.

Accelerated Reward Points on PhonePe spends apply to select categories such as recharges, utilities, bill payments, insurance, travel, and Pincode spends as described on the official product page and current T&C.
PhonePe SBI Card SELECT BLACK is exempt from the 1 Apr 2026 statement credit redemption revision that moved most SBI cards to 4,000-point multiples and imposed a 60,000-point monthly cap.
Priority Pass membership is complimentary for the first two card membership years; the product page does not list complimentary international lounge visits under this benefit.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-25.
